domain: Lichen mycobiont-photobiont symbiosis — composite organism with fungus providing structure and photobiont providing photosynthesis; obligately co-dependent.
specific_mechanism: Fungus provides thallus morphology + nutrient extraction; alga/cyanobacterium provides reduced carbon; bidirectional obligate metabolic exchange that determines composite organism's properties.
llm_application: LICHEN-LLM: train two models jointly as OBLIGATE PAIR — small specialist M_p (1B, factual-content) operates EMBEDDED INSIDE the residual stream of large M_m (70B, structural-syntactic) at each layer. M_p's outputs concatenate into M_m's residual at fixed layers; both are co-trained s.t. M_m cannot generate correctly without M_p's contributions, and M_p cannot output anything without M_m's structural scaffold. Tightly-coupled deployment.
novelty_claim: Speculative decoding has parallel draft model. Cascading routes between models. RAG queries external. MoE gates between experts. None train two models as obligately co-dependent such that NEITHER functions standalone — the residual-stream-level OBLIGATE embedding is mechanistically distinct.
